creator: ed@80386.nl
text:
Hi,

* Ed Schouten <ed@80386.nl>, 20111011 14:32:
> I'd rather see something like the attached patch get committed upstream.

And so it has been done.

	http://cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/app/luit/commit/?id=525785fd7beca872ebeeb8bb6c22d82459128788

I think for FreeBSD, it would be sufficient to just put this patch in
the files/ directory for thei time being.

	http://80386.nl/pub/luit.txt

-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@80386.nl>
 WWW: http://80386.nl/
